title: sagina alexandrae
intro: Sagina alexandrae, also known as Alexandra's pearlwort, is a flowering plant species in the carnation family that is native to New Zealand. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Sagina alexandrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
